summary: Script is well-crafted (explicit types, error handling, clear regex patterns), but deliverable critically fails task requirements. Missing: entire test suite (task mandated TDD—tests first), mock commit fixtures, act-result.txt artifact, and test harness to run cases through act. Workflow (L18-22) references non-existent fixture files; run steps (L40+) only execute once—no test loop verifying expected outputs for multiple cases per task spec: "Every single test case must execute through... act", "parse act output and assert EXACT EXPECTED VALUES". Script untested; workflow doesn't implement required testing infrastructure.
